title: knautia godetii subsp. lebrunii
intro: Knautia godetii subsp. lebrunii is a subspecies of the Knautia godetii plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the phlox family, known for its vibrant purple flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Knautia godetii subsp. lebrunii include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to help manage conditions such as arthritis and diabetes. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
